---
title: "Modelling active travel with efficient, future-proof tools"
event: "ETH Zürich Colloquium"
event-url: ""
location: "ETH Zürich, Campus Hoenggerberg"
address:
  street: ""
  city: "Zürich"
  region: ""
  postcode: ""
  country: "Switzerland"
summary: "A talk at the colloquium following Eva Heinen's inaugural lecture at ETH Zürich."
abstract: "Details to follow."

# Talk start and end times.
date: 2025-11-18T10:05:00+01:00
date-end: 2025-11-18T10:40:00+01:00
all_day: false

# Schedule page publish date (NOT event date).
publish-date: 2025-11-07T00:00:00Z

tags: ["Transport", "Micromobility", "Active Travel"]

# Is this a featured event? (true/false)
featured: true

url_code: ""
url_pdf: ""
url_video: ""

slides: ""
projects: []
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---
